title: 20 Packs Colorful Galaxy Slime, Stretchy & Non-Sticky,Idea Stocking Stuffers for Christmas,Party Favors for Kids, Sensory and Tactile Stimulation, Stress Relief, Educational Game, for Girls & Boys
features: 【Galaxy Slime Kit】Slime package include 20 pack soft and wet galaxy slime, Every kid would love these cute slime and get days of enjoyment and fun from it!

【Amazing Arts and Crafts】Best for birthday gifts, Christmas stocking stuffers for kids, school or carnival prizes, classroom participation rewards, baby showers or Halloween’s trick or treat bag fillers, dance props, eggs on Easter Sunday, and event centerpieces.
【Enjoyable Gift for Kids】With Seperated Container,Perfect Party Favor DIY Toys For Girls And Boys,Children Can Play With Each Other And Exchange Gifts
【Education and Play】Play Slimes Can Exercise The Kids' Imagination of the World and Develop The Kids' Creativity of Stuffs Around，Suitable for children aged 6 7 8 9 10 11 12
【Child Safety】These slime are made from safe and non-toxic glue material, suit 6 years and up children.
